description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.5.7-alpine Docker image and runs a before_script that executes "apk update", "apk add ruby-dev alpine-sdk", "gem install rubocop-ast -v \"1.17\" -N", and "gem install rubocop -v \"1.18.4\" -N". Define a single stage called test. Add a rubocop job in the test stage that runs the command "rubocop". No services, caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are required.
